text:
Dear [Friend's name],

I just heard the news and I couldn't be more thrilled for you! This is such a wonderful accomplishment, and honestly, it doesn't surprise me one bit. You've worked so hard for this opportunity, and you absolutely deserved it.

I still remember all those conversations where you talked about this role and what it would mean to you. Seeing your dream come true is genuinely one of the best things. I have no doubt you're going to do amazing things in this position and that your new team is lucky to have you.

I'd love to celebrate with you soon. Let me know when you're free and we'll grab coffee or dinner, my treat. I want to hear all about it.

Congratulations again. You've got this.

All my best,
[Your name]
